recipe.title: Dubai Chewy Cookie (Du-Jjon-Ku)

ingredients.name: butter
ingredients.note: Split: toast kataifi, then marshmallow shell.

ingredients.name: kadayif (kataifi) chopped
ingredients.note: Crispy shredded pastry; toast until deep golden.

ingredients.name: pistachio cream
ingredients.note: Sweet spreadable pistachio paste; vivid green.

ingredients.name: tahini
ingredients.note: Sesame depth in filling; optional in some viral variants.

ingredients.name: marshmallows
ingredients.note: Jumbo preferred; slow melt for chewy shell.

ingredients.name: cocoa powder
ingredients.note: Chocolate marshmallow shell and matte dusting.

ingredients.name: milk powder
ingredients.note: Optional but adds toasty milky note to shell.

ingredients.name: neutral oil
ingredients.note: For gloves/board so warm marshmallow does not stick.

ingredients.name: cupcake liners
ingredients.note: Keeps cocoa-dusted cookies from sticking together.

steps.visualCue: shredded strands turn deep amber in butter with audible crunch
steps.textureCue: soft threads to glassy brittle gold
steps.runwayRisk: under-toasted soggy strands or burned bitter edges

steps.visualCue: golden kataifi folded into bright pistachio cream with tahini
steps.runwayRisk: filling reads as smooth ganache without kataifi shards

steps.visualCue: domed green filling balls on parchment, firm and matte cold
steps.runwayRisk: balls collapse or scale drift oversized

steps.visualCue: marshmallows soften at low heat, glossy stretch begins

steps.text: Stir in cocoa and milk powder
steps.visualCue: cocoa cloud whisked into smooth chocolate marshmallow gloss
steps.runwayRisk: dry cocoa lumps or split greasy mix

steps.visualCue: glossy sheet on oiled board, knife marks six portions
steps.textureCue: warm tacky chocolate sheet with clean cuts
steps.runwayRisk: sheet sets too fast before shaping

steps.visualCue: oiled gloved hands flatten disc, enclose green ball, roll smooth sphere
steps.textureCue: chewy chocolate shell sealing pistachio core
steps.runwayRisk: hand-cloth fusion; filling leak if shell too thin

steps.visualCue: matte cocoa skin on domed balls in cupcake liners
steps.textureCue: powdery cocoa contrast on glossy chew
steps.runwayRisk: clumpy wet cocoa if shell still hot

steps.visualCue: halved cookie shows green pistachio-kataifi center against brown shell
steps.textureCue: soft chew shell vs crisp emerald interior
steps.runwayRisk: cross-section geometry wrong if scale not locked

assumptions: Primary yield: 6 cookies per iamafoodblog.com (secondary reference yields 10; production locks 6 for consistent scale).
Finished cookie diameter 3.5-4 cm domed sphere, height ~3.5 cm, one per cupcake liner on Licorn terrazzo.
Filling ball ~2.5-3 cm before wrap; visible green pistachio-kataifi core on cross-section.
No baking step; marshmallow shell set at room temperature after shaping.
Stovetop toasting and melting on Licorn induction with SaucepanLarge; shaping on terrazzo island.
criticalTransformations: Kataifi strands toast from pale hay to deep amber brittle in butter.
Pistachio cream binds toasted kataifi into a moldable crunchy filling.
Frozen domed filling balls hold geometry for wrapping.
Marshmallows melt into stretchy chocolate gloss with cocoa and milk powder.
Warm marshmallow disc wraps and seals around cold filling without leaking.
Cocoa dust sets a matte chocolate skin on chewy spheres.
Cross-section reveals crisp green pistachio-kataifi core inside brown shell.
visualTextureOpportunities: Butter sizzle as kataifi strands hit the pan.
Audible crunch toss of golden kataifi pile.
Bright pistachio cream swirl through crunchy strands.
Cookie scoop doming vivid green filling.
Cocoa powder cloud dissolving into glossy marshmallow.
Stretch pull of warm chocolate marshmallow ribbon.
Oiled glove pinch sealing shell around filling.
Cocoa dust cloud settling on domed spheres.
Warm knife halving to expose emerald crunchy center.
Chewy shell peel slightly from crisp filling.
possibleHooks: Extreme macro: kataifi strands turning glassy gold in foaming butter (texture-first).
Instant payoff: crunch toss immediately after golden toast.
Pistachio cream flood turning kataifi pile vivid green.
Glossy chocolate marshmallow stretch with cocoa swirl.
Cross-section reveal: brown chew vs green pistachio crunch.
